name: xmit-mcp
description: MCP server for xMIT. Three-module decentralized financial intelligence platform: xCGO (Governance), xSTM (Short Thesis), xIFD (Institutional Flow). Decode SEC EDGAR filings and access adversarial research via x402 USDC micropayments.

tools.name: xcgo_query
tools.description: Corporate Governance Oracle (xCGO). Fetch governance scores, board effectiveness, and executive compensation red flags decoded from SEC EDGAR DEF 14A proxy statements.

tools.name: xstm_query
tools.description: Short Thesis Marketplace (xSTM). Query adversarial research and red flags derived from EDGAR, OpenCorporates, and CourtListener.

tools.name: xifd_query
tools.description: Institutional Flow Decoder (xIFD). Real-time tracking of institutional money movement via 13F, 13D, 13G, and Form 4 filings.
